creator: pdh@pcsforney.com
text: when debugging a program with radare2, setting a breakpoint on a line will not stop execution at the breakpoint. This issue can be reproduced by writing a program to print out 10 lines and then setting a breakpoint at the line which prints the text. The program will show that a breakpoint (b) is set at the line, but the program will continue as if it was not set.
